name: Le Gia Thai
about: I'm currently a student at Foreign Trade University, my major is ACCA-Oriented Accounting and Auditing. Apart from my academic knowledge, I also have experience in 2D Graphic Designing, Video Editing and Photography.
Outstanding, unkillable demon king of League of Legends

projects.title: REUNIFICATION DAY PHOTOS ALBUM
projects.description: Some of the photos were also used by FTU Times and Yo News. If you have been once familiar with the 30/4 style background of Yo News notification posts, yep that's my photo in the background.
